title: helichrysum milne-redheadii
intro: Helichrysum milne-redheadii, also known as Mountain Everlasting, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, belonging to the daisy family and characterized by its small, yellow flowers and silvery-green foliage. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum milne-redheadii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Helichrysum milne-redheadii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for a range of applications and dosages to suit individual needs.
